title: User can log in with valid credentials
User sees error on invalid password
User can reset password via email link
Password reset link expires after 24 hours
User can add item to cart
Cart total updates when quantity changes
Checkout fails gracefully with declined card
Order confirmation email is sent after purchase

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Successful login with valid credentials
description: Verify a registered user can log in successfully using correct username/email and password.
steps: Enter a valid registered username/email in the username field
Enter the correct corresponding password in the password field
expectedResult: User is authenticated and redirected to the application dashboard/home page; session is established.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login fails with incorrect password
description: Verify the system rejects login when a valid username is paired with an incorrect password.
expectedResult: Login is rejected with a generic error message (e.g., 'Invalid username or password'); user remains on the login page; no indication of which field was wrong.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login fails with non-existent username
description: Verify the system rejects login attempts using a username/email that does not exist in the system.
steps: Enter a username/email not registered in the system
expectedResult: Login is rejected with a generic error message that does not reveal whether the account exists.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login with empty username and password
description: Verify client-side/server-side validation when both fields are left blank.
steps: Leave username and password fields empty
expectedResult: Form does not submit; inline validation messages indicate both fields are required.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login with empty username only
description: Verify validation when username is blank but password is entered.
expectedResult: Form does not submit; validation message prompts user to enter a username/email.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login with empty password only
description: Verify validation when password is blank but username is entered.
expectedResult: Form does not submit; validation message prompts user to enter a password.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Username field is case-insensitive (if applicable)
description: Verify whether login succeeds when username/email casing differs from the stored record.
steps: Enter a registered username/email with altered case (e.g., UPPERCASE)
expectedResult: Behavior matches documented business rule (typically case-insensitive for email-based logins); result is consistent and not ambiguous.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Password field is case-sensitive
description: Verify that password matching is case-sensitive as expected for security.
steps: Enter the correct password but with inverted case
expectedResult: Login fails since password comparison is case-sensitive.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: SQL injection attempt in login fields
description: Verify the login form is resistant to SQL injection payloads in username/password fields.
steps: Enter a SQL injection payload (e.g., admin' OR '1'='1) in the username field
Enter any value in the password field
expectedResult: Login is rejected with a generic error; no authentication bypass occurs; no SQL error or stack trace is exposed.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: XSS injection attempt in login fields
description: Verify the login form sanitizes/escapes script-based input to prevent reflected XSS.
steps: Enter a script payload (e.g., <script>alert(1)</script>) in the username field
expectedResult: Input is treated as plain text/escaped; no script execution occurs; error message displayed normally.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Account lockout after multiple failed login attempts
description: Verify the system enforces a lockout or throttling mechanism after repeated failed login attempts to prevent brute-force attacks.
steps: Enter a valid username with an incorrect password
Repeat the failed attempt the configured number of times (e.g., 5 times)
Attempt login again with correct credentials
expectedResult: Account is temporarily locked or a CAPTCHA/delay is enforced; user is notified with an appropriate message; login is blocked until lockout period expires or account is unlocked.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Password field masks input
description: Verify that characters typed into the password field are masked by default.
expectedResult: Entered characters are displayed as dots/asterisks, not plain text.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Show/Hide password toggle works correctly
description: Verify the visibility toggle icon (if present) correctly shows and hides the password text.
steps: Enter a password into the password field
expectedResult: Password text toggles between visible plain text and masked state accurately.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login session persists with 'Remember Me' checked
description: Verify that selecting 'Remember Me' (if available) keeps the user logged in across browser sessions.
steps: Close and reopen the browser, then revisit the URL
expectedResult: User remains logged in without being prompted to re-authenticate, per the remember-me duration policy.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login session does not persist without 'Remember Me'
description: Verify that without selecting 'Remember Me', the session ends when the browser is closed.
steps: Enter valid credentials without checking 'Remember Me'
Close the browser completely and reopen, then revisit the URL
expectedResult: User is prompted to log in again; session was not persisted.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: 'Forgot Password' link navigates correctly
description: Verify the forgot password link/flow is accessible and functional from the login page.
expectedResult: User is redirected to the password reset/recovery page where they can initiate a reset request.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Logout functionality terminates the session
description: Verify that logging out invalidates the current session and prevents access to protected pages.
steps: Use the browser back button to navigate to a previously accessed protected page
expectedResult: User is redirected to the login page and cannot access protected content without re-authenticating; session/token is invalidated server-side.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Session timeout after period of inactivity
description: Verify the system logs out or re-prompts authentication after a defined idle timeout.
steps: Leave the session idle for the configured timeout duration
Attempt to perform an action or navigate within the app
expectedResult: User session has expired; user is redirected to the login page or prompted to re-authenticate.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login over HTTPS with no sensitive data exposure
description: Verify that the login page is served over HTTPS and credentials are not exposed in URL, browser history, or logs.
steps: Confirm the connection uses HTTPS with a valid certificate
Inspect network request payload and browser URL
expectedResult: Connection is secured via HTTPS; credentials are sent via POST body (not URL/query string); password is not visible in browser history or server logs.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login with disabled or inactive account
description: Verify that users with a disabled/inactive/suspended account cannot log in and receive an appropriate message.
steps: Enter credentials belonging to a deactivated/suspended account
expectedResult: Login is denied with a clear message such as 'Your account is inactive, please contact support'; user is not authenticated.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login with leading/trailing whitespace in username
description: Verify the system trims or correctly handles leading/trailing spaces entered in the username/email field.
steps: Enter a valid username/email with extra leading and trailing spaces
expectedResult: Login succeeds as whitespace is trimmed, or a clear validation error is shown; behavior is consistent.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Login with maximum length input in fields
description: Verify the system gracefully handles excessively long input in username/password fields without crashing or causing errors.
steps: Enter an extremely long string (e.g., 5000 characters) into the username field
Enter an extremely long string into the password field
expectedResult: Input is either truncated per field max-length constraint or rejected with a validation message; no application error or crash occurs.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Keyboard navigation and accessibility on login form
description: Verify the login form can be fully operated using only the keyboard (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter).
steps: Use Tab key to move focus through username field, password field, and login button
Enter valid credentials using keyboard only
expectedResult: Focus order is logical; all fields/buttons are reachable and operable via keyboard; form submits successfully on Enter.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com

Resize browser window / test on mobile and tablet viewport widths
expectedResult: Login form is fully visible, properly aligned, and usable across all tested browsers and screen sizes (responsive design).

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Browser autofill/autocomplete behavior
description: Verify that browser autofill suggestions populate username/password fields correctly when previously saved.

Navigate to the login page again
expectedResult: Browser autofill suggestion appears (if enabled) and correctly populates username and password fields when selected.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Concurrent login from multiple devices/browsers
description: Verify the expected behavior when the same account logs in simultaneously from two different devices/browsers.
steps: Log in with valid credentials on Device/Browser A
Log in with the same credentials on Device/Browser B
Check session status on Device/Browser A
expectedResult: Behavior matches the application's session policy (e.g., both sessions remain active, or the first session is invalidated with a notification); no unexpected errors occur.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Redirect to originally requested page after login
description: Verify that accessing a protected URL while logged out redirects to login, and after successful authentication redirects back to the originally requested page (deep-link handling).
steps: While logged out, attempt to navigate directly to a protected/internal page URL
Confirm redirection to the login page
expectedResult: After successful login, user is redirected to the originally requested protected page rather than a generic default landing page.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Error message does not leak sensitive system information
description: Verify that login error messages and page source do not reveal stack traces, server details, or internal implementation info.
steps: Trigger a login failure using invalid credentials and malformed input
Inspect the error message and page response/network details
expectedResult: Only a generic, user-friendly error message is shown; no stack trace, server version, or internal error details are exposed.

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: Password field rejects copy-paste restrictions (if applicable)
description: Verify whether the password field allows or restricts paste actions, consistent with the application's security policy.
steps: Copy a password value to clipboard
Click into the password field and attempt to paste
expectedResult: Behavior matches documented policy; if pasting is allowed, password pastes correctly; if restricted, a clear indication is given (not a silent failure).

module: generate the test cases for login module for the URL https://flexos.test.varshealth.com
title: CAPTCHA/verification challenge appears after suspicious activity
description: Verify a CAPTCHA or bot-detection challenge is triggered after repeated failed attempts or suspicious automated behavior, if implemented.
steps: Submit several rapid failed login attempts in succession

expectedResult: A CAPTCHA or similar challenge is presented before further login attempts are accepted, mitigating automated brute-force attacks.
